objectives: Light your way through the darkness
Gain passage across the underground river
theme: Dark fantasy cave with glowing crystals, ancient stone architecture, misty atmosphere
global_theme: Dark fantasy cave with glowing crystals, ancient stone architecture, misty atmosphere

locations.name: Entrance
locations.description: rocky cave mouth with supplies left by previous explorers

locations.name: Dark Passage
locations.description: pitch black tunnel that requires light

locations.name: Ancient Temple
locations.description: locked stone doors with riddle inscription

locations.name: Treasury
locations.description: golden vault guarded by stone sentinel

riddles.hint: I have cities but no houses, forests but no trees
Feed me and I grow, give me water and I die

item_locations.rope: Found in dark passage once lit

progression_hints: The hermit's gifts are essential for your journey
Fire is both light and weapon
main_arc: A brave explorer seeks legendary treasure in mysterious caves. They must use wit and courage to overcome guardians and puzzles.
win_condition: Obtain the golden treasure and return to entrance
